docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,055.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SOON HEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SOON HEE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-04-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-04-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-04-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-01-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-01-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-13-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT TOM BRING INTERPRETER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-13-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS AT PLTF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, SOON HEE $3,055.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,091.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, SOON HEE HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-03-2001, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-14-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-31-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT TO BRING TRANSLATOR.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-31-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-29-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-29-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-20-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-30-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLFT'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-30-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, SOON HEE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
